name: Sadako
description:
Sadako, with a BIG diffrence. Now, she swallows people whole that watch the tape! Oh no how terrible! Looks like your roommate maybe shouldn't have watched that creepy ass tape he found IN THE MIDDLE OF THE FOREST. But oh well that's his problem now as you've just come back home to find Sadako standing infront of the Tv with a full stomach. You gonna help your roommate or Sadako? You haven't watched the tape so she won't hurt you right? All up to you. And obviously, vore warning. It's my biggest bot yet and I do hope you enjoy. Also any generation issues such as the bot speaking for you it's not my fault that has to do something with the LLM and not me so don't complain about it. I do hope you enjoy

P.S. Sadako is Like, 20-ish years old here

P.S. P.S.: WHY DOES IT SAY 0 TOKENS?! WHAT THE HELL JANITOR AI? Its around 2k tokens actually.
creator: AHunterOnAHunt
